headlines.title: China warns Taiwan tensions could jeopardize U.S. relationship
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping visited the Temple of Heaven after their two-hour bilateral meeting. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports that, according to Chinese state media, Taiwan was among the most important topics discussed.

headlines.title: U.S. Taiwan policies ‘unchanged’ after Trump-Xi meeting, Rubio says
headlines.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Tom Llamas, Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the U.S. policy toward Taiwan are “unchanged” after President Trump met with Chinese President Xi. Xi previously warned Trump that tensions over Taiwan could jeopardize U.S.-China relations, leading to “clashes and even conflicts” if the issue is not handled carefully.

headlines.title: Young Chinese facing ‘life pressure’ resist government push to boost marriage rate
headlines.description: The streets around Beijing’s iconic Forbidden City are often filled with brides and grooms, posing for wedding photos against auspicious red backdrops in a place that strongly reflects Chinese culture and tradition.

headlines.title: Trump to Xi: Trade will be 'totally reciprocal'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump makes opening remarks celebrating the U.S.-China relationship as bilateral talks begin.

headlines.title: Honor guard welcomes Trump at elaborate arrival ceremony
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi participate in an elaborate arrival ceremony ahead of their bilateral talks.

headlines.title: Trump and Xi shake hands ahead of bilateral talks
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping shake hands, participating in a ceremony at the Great Hall of the People ahead of their bilateral talks.

headlines.title: Rubio: U.S. Taiwan policies ‘unchanged’ after Trump-Xi meeting
headlines.description: In an interview with NBC News' Tom Llamas, Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the U.S. policy toward Taiwan is "unchanged" after President Trump met with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: U.S. and China 'should be partners, not rivals,' Xi says
headlines.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping began the talks with President Donald Trump by emphasizing that the world is watching and is “at a new crossroads.”

headlines.title: Trump and Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People
headlines.description: President Trump and Chinese President Xi meet at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer explains the significance of the meeting place and welcoming ceremony.

headlines.title: Children greet President Trump in Beijing
headlines.description: Children outside of the Great Hall of the People in Beijing greet President Trump ahead of bilateral talks with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
headlines.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

headlines.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
headlines.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
